memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t framebuffer_width, uint32_t framebuffer_height, float z_min=0, float z_max=0x7FFF, bool enable_lighting=true, bool use_4_component_texcoords=false)
memberdef.name: ProjectionVertexShader

briefdescription.para: Unprojects the given screen point, producing world coordinates that will project there.
Unprojects the given screen point, producing world coordinates that will project there with the given Z value.
